title: Reserve drill weekend field training package
mission_or_training_goal: Build a one-day field training event that improves planning discipline, reporting, and civil reconnaissance readiness.
constraints: Distributed Marines arriving from multiple locations
Limited time for equipment draw and rehearsals
civil_considerations: Need for realistic but generic humanitarian context
medical_risk_context: Limited daylight for recovery and consolidation
intelligence_question: What open-source humanitarian and civil-support issues in South Florida could inform a realistic training scenario without creating unnecessary operational specificity?
c2_objective: Maintain reliable internal reporting and accountability during a one-day distributed field event using commercial-safe communications assumptions.
support_objective: Keep the event administratively supportable for a reserve unit with limited setup time and travel friction.
